rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume/guarantee labels, eq/const declarations, and assign statements
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for clear contract expressions
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
generic_rules: Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed through typed ports or constants
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for const and eq declarations
Delete or rewrite AGREE clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for clear contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers; use exact visible identifiers
Do not use AADL property names (Compute_Execution_Time, Deadline, etc.) as AGREE variables
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types (integer, boolean); use int, real, and bool instead
